acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Direct, absolute, env-prefixed and nested shell-wrapper cases are covered.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Direct GitHub REST and GraphQL are blocked
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: API and GraphQL URL patterns fail closed and redact sensitive summaries.
Fetch, status and guarded non-force push commands remain permitted.
312 tests, 0 failures, 2 intentional skips, 100 percent coverage, Credo and Dialyzer clean.

summary: The instrumented App Server approval path enforces the exclusive bos-mcp integration boundary.
